scripts.lint: if [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/eslint ]; then ./node_modules/.bin/eslint -c .eslintrc.js --ext .ts src; else ../../node_modules/.bin/eslint -c .eslintrc.js --ext .ts src; fi
scripts.compile: if [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/tsc ]; then ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json; else ../../node_modules/.bin/tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && ../../node_modules/.bin/tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json; fi
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run compile
scripts.coverage: npm test && if [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/nyc ]; then ./node_modules/.bin/nyc report -r html; else ../../node_modules/.bin/nyc report -r html; fi
